संशोिधत -कया गया था । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE ORDER New Delhi, the 30th December, 2015 S.O. 3553(E).—In exersice of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes following further amendment in the Order of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forests number S.O. 489(E), dated the 30th April, 2003, namely:— In the said Order, in paragraph 1, for the words “for a period of twelve years and eight months” the words “for a period of thirteen years and eight months” shall be substituted. [F. No. Z-20018/1/99-CPA] RASHID HASAN, Advisor Note : The principal Order was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 489(E), dated the 30th April, 2003 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 56(E), dated the 14th January, 2005, S.O. 253(E), dated the 19th Febuary, 2007, S.O. 1539(E), dated the 24th June, 2008, S.O. 3303(E), dated the 29th December, 2009, S.O. 2866(E), dated the 27th December, 2011 and S.O. 3822(E) dated the 27th December, 2013. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
